title: Stripe MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Stripe MCP Server for Claude
Payment processing, subscription management, and financial transaction handling
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Stripe
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `payments` `stripe` `billing` `subscriptions` `commerce`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http stripe https://mcp.stripe.com && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "stripe": {
    "url": "https://mcp.stripe.com",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http stripe https://mcp.stripe.com && claude mcp list

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/stripe-mcp-server
